allow: Bash(node -e 'const j=require\("./market-data/AAPL/data.json"\); const k=Object.keys\(j.historyByDate\); const payout=k.find\(d=>j.historyByDate[d].isPayoutDate\); console.log\("sample payout date entry:", payout, JSON.stringify\(j.historyByDate[payout]\)\)')

Bash(node -e 'let s="";process.stdin.on\("data",d=>s+=d\).on\("end",\(\)=>{const a=JSON.parse\(s\);console.log\("date:",a.date,"cash:",a.cash\);let basis=0;for\(const [code,lots] of Object.entries\(a.positions\)\){const cb=lots.reduce\(\(t,l\)=>t+l.quantity*l.cost_per_share,0\);const q=lots.reduce\(\(t,l\)=>t+l.quantity,0\);basis+=cb;console.log\(`  ${code}: qty=${q} costBasis=${cb.toFixed\(2\)} lots=${lots.length}`\)}console.log\("TOTAL principal \(cost basis\):", basis.toFixed\(2\)\)}\)')
